name: Treez Cannabis Retail Management API
what_it_does: Treez REST API for cannabis dispensary retail operations platform. Enables AI agents to manage cannabis product catalogs and inventory, process sales transactions with compliance validation, integrate with METRC seed-to-sale tracking, handle express pickup and delivery orders, access real-time sales analytics and reporting, manage loyalty programs, and connect dispensary data with wholesale procurement and ERP systems.
use_cases: Managing cannabis product catalog and inventory from dispensary management agents
Processing compliant retail transactions from point-of-sale automation agents
Retrieving real-time sales and inventory analytics from business intelligence agents
Managing loyalty program points and member data from customer retention agents
not_for: Non-cannabis retail without seed-to-sale compliance requirements
Cannabis cultivation without retail dispensary operations focus
States where cannabis is not legally permitted
best_when: A licensed cannabis dispensary or MSO using Treez wants AI agents to automate inventory management, transaction processing, METRC compliance, analytics reporting, and loyalty program management.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Cannabis retail requires state licensing and strict regulatory compliance. Age verification must be enforced. METRC compliance errors can result in regulatory action or license revocation.

auth.notes: Treez uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Dispensary-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Scopes control access to inventory, transactions, and analytics data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — cannabis dispensary enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; enterprise pricing for MSOs
pricing.notes: San Francisco company, founded 2016. Cannabis retail analytics focus alongside POS. Strong real-time data and analytics capabilities. Used by emerging and established MSOs. Competes with Dutchie and Flowhub.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: State cannabis license required; strict regulatory compliance mandatory
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2 partner program
Age verification mandatory for every transaction — automated sales must confirm ID check
METRC state compliance reporting is critical — validate before automating
US data residency only — state-by-state cannabis law differences affect API behavior
Analytics-forward platform — strong data access makes it good for BI agent integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cannabis customer and compliance data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. State licensing and METRC compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cannabis compliance and customer data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. METRC compliance required.
